input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.13.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.13.3.2
            TITLE: inspection approval is valid only for the duration of the specific formula sae competition

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.13.3.2: Inspection Approval is valid only for the duration of the specific Formula SAE competition
IN.13.3.2 Inspection Approval is valid only for the duration of the specific Formula SAE competition 
during which the inspection is conducted.

final_answer: Inspection Approval is valid only for the duration of the specific Formula SAE competition during which the inspection is conducted.
